attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
  RANK() OVER (ORDER BY STSLSCR_BK.TRX_SC_ID) +  SMSLSCR_MAX.MAX_SLSCR_SGK_VAL  SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY,
 'CG' AS SS_CD,
  STSLSCR_BK.TRX_SC_ID   SK_LINE_SEQUENCE_ID_INT,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
  USER EDW_CREATE_USER
  FROM 
  (
   SELECT
    DISTINCT TRX_SC_ID
   FROM
   $$STGDB.ST_XXOTM_PHX_TRX_SC_RT SXPTS
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOTM_PHX_TRX_RT EXPT  
   ON SXPTS.TRX_ID = EXPT.TRX_ID 
   AND EXPT.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE = 'RTE_ADJ' 
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOTM_PHX_SALES_CREDITS ELSC
    ON SXPTS.SC_ID = ELSC.SC_ID 
   -- AND ELSC.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE ='DR'  --commented by phanired to bring all the data
    )STSLSCR_BK,
  (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY),0) MAX_SLSCR_SGK_VAL 
  FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SCA_FOR_RTE_TRX) SMSLSCR_MAX
  WHERE NOT EXISTS
   (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SCA_FOR_RTE_TRX SSCA
   WHERE SSCA.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT = STSLSCR_BK.TRX_SC_ID)

SELECT
 SXPT.TRX_SC_ID,
 SXPT.TRX_ID,
 SXPT.SC_ID,
 SXPT.SC_SEQUENCE ,
 SXPT.TRX_SPLIT_ID,
 SXPT.TOTAL_SPLIT_PERCENT,
 SXPT.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT,
 SXPT.TRX_SPLIT_PERCENT,
 SXPT.LATEST_SC_FLAG,
 SXPT.PARENT_CHILD_FLAG,
 SXPT.OTM_BATCH_ID,
 SXPT.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER,
 SXPT.SC_DUPLICATE_FLAG,
 SXPT.CREATION_DATE,
 SXPT.CREATED_BY,
 SXPT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
 SXPT.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
 SXPT.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
 SXPT.START_DATE,
 SXPT.EXPIRATION_DATE,
 SXPT.SOURCE_DML_TYPE,
 SXPT.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
 SXPT.REFRESH_DATETIME,
 ELSC.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE AS BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD -- added by phanired
 FROM  $$STGDB.ST_XXOTM_PHX_TRX_SC_RT SXPT 
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOTM_PHX_TRX_RT EXPT  
  ON SXPT.TRX_ID = EXPT.TRX_ID  
  AND EXPT.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE = 'RTE_ADJ'       
    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOTM_PHX_SALES_CREDITS ELSC
   ON SXPT.SC_ID = ELSC.SC_ID               
   --AND ELSC.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE ='DR' --commented by phanired
 WHERE  NOT EXISTS 
 (SELECT 1 FROM 
 $$ETLVWDB.SM_SCA_FOR_RTE_TRX SRSCA
 INNER JOIN $$WORKDB.W_SCA_FOR_RTE_TRX WRSCA 
 ON (WRSCA.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY=SRSCA.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY)
 WHERE SXPT.TRX_SC_ID=SRSCA.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT)

SELECT 
 TMP.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY,
 TMP.SS_CD, 
 TMP.SOURCE_TRX_ID,
 TMP.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
 TMP.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
 TMP.DV_SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT,
 TMP.SCA_SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM,         
 TMP.DV_SCA_SOURCE_UPDATE_DT,
 TMP.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
 TMP.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
 TMP.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
 TMP.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 TMP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 TMP.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 TMP.START_TV_DTM, 
 TMP.END_TV_DTM,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 USER EDW_UPDATE_USER1, 
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 USER  EDW_CREATE_USER1,
 TMP.ACTION_CODE,
 TMP.DML_TYPE,
 TMP.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD-- added by phanired 
 FROM (
 SELECT
   SRSCA.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY,
   NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CD, 
   EXPT.SOURCE_TRX_ID,
   SUCLSCN.TRX_SC_ID SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
   SUCLSCN.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
   CAST(SUCLSCN.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME AS DATE) DV_SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT,
   SUCLSCN.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS SCA_SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM,
   CAST(SUCLSCN.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS DATE) DV_SCA_SOURCE_UPDATE_DT,
   'R'  AS SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
   (ELSC.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT*100) SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
   COALESCE(ELSC.SC_TYPE_CODE,'Direct Sales') BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
   COALESCE(NESR.SALES_REP_NUMBER,'99998') SALES_REP_NUMBER,
   COALESCE(NSTT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,73106) SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
   EXPT.SOURCE_TRX_ID EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
   SUCLSCN.START_DATE AS START_TV_DTM, 
   COALESCE(SUCLSCN.EXPIRATION_DATE, CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0) ))  AS END_TV_DTM,
   'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
   CASE WHEN NRSCA.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY  IS NOT NULL THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END AS DML_TYPE,
   ELSC.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE AS BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD -- added by phanired    
  FROM
  (SELECT SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE FROM 
  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES WHERE GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG') NSSC,
  $$STGDB.ST_XXOTM_PHX_TRX_SC_RT SUCLSCN
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOTM_PHX_TRX_RT EXPT  
  ON SUCLSCN.TRX_ID = EXPT.TRX_ID  
  AND EXPT.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE = 'RTE_ADJ' 
    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOTM_PHX_SALES_CREDITS ELSC
   ON SUCLSCN.SC_ID = ELSC.SC_ID 
   --AND ELSC.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE ='DR' --Commented by phanired
    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SCA_FOR_RTE_TRX SRSCA  
   ON SUCLSCN.TRX_SC_ID=SRSCA.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT 
    INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV NSCT
   ON ELSC.SC_TYPE_CODE=NSCT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE 
   AND NSCT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_SALES_REP_TV NESR
   ON TRIM( LEADING '0' FROM ELSC.SALESREP_NUMBER)=  TRIM( LEADING '0' FROM COALESCE(NESR.SALES_REP_NUMBER,CAST('99998' AS VARCHAR(30))))/*trim function added as a part of RTEQ2FY15CR by sabanil */
   AND NESR.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV NSTT
   ON ELSC.SHR_NODE_ID=NSTT.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT AND NSTT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01' 
   LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCA_FOR_RTE_TRX_TV NRSCA 
   ON SRSCA.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY = NRSCA.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY
   AND NRSCA.END_TV_DT= CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
   AND NRSCA.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD ='R'
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SUCLSCN.TRX_SC_ID, SUCLSCN.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME 
  ORDER BY SUCLSCN.REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1 
  WHERE  SUCLSCN.SOURCE_DML_TYPE<> 'DELETE'  
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
   SRSCA.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY,
   NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CD, 
   EXPT.SOURCE_TRX_ID,
   SUCLSCN.TRX_SC_ID SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
   SUCLSCN.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
   CAST(SUCLSCN.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME AS DATE) DV_SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT,
   SUCLSCN.LAST_UPDATE_DATE  AS SCA_SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM,
   CAST(SUCLSCN.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS DATE) DV_SCA_SOURCE_UPDATE_DT,
   'R'  AS SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
   (ELSC.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT*100) SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
   COALESCE(ELSC.SC_TYPE_CODE,'Direct Sales') BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
   COALESCE(NESR.SALES_REP_NUMBER,'99998') SALES_REP_NUMBER,
   COALESCE(NSTT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,73106) SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
   EXPT.SOURCE_TRX_ID EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
   SUCLSCN.START_DATE AS START_TV_DTM, 
   COALESCE(SUCLSCN.EXPIRATION_DATE, CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0) ))  AS END_TV_DTM,
   'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
   CASE WHEN NRSCA.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY  IS NOT NULL THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END AS DML_TYPE,
   ELSC.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE AS BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD -- added by phanired 
  FROM
  (SELECT SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE FROM 
  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES WHERE GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG') NSSC,
  $$EXCEPDB.EX_XXOTM_PHX_TRX_SC_RT SUCLSCN
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOTM_PHX_TRX_RT EXPT  
  ON SUCLSCN.TRX_ID = EXPT.TRX_ID  
  AND EXPT.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE = 'RTE_ADJ' 
    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOTM_PHX_SALES_CREDITS ELSC
   ON SUCLSCN.SC_ID = ELSC.SC_ID --AND ELSC.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE ='DR' --commented by phanired
    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SCA_FOR_RTE_TRX SRSCA  
   ON SUCLSCN.TRX_SC_ID=SRSCA.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT 
    INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV NSCT
   ON ELSC.SC_TYPE_CODE=NSCT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE 
   AND NSCT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_SALES_REP_TV NESR
   ON TRIM( LEADING '0' FROM ELSC.SALESREP_NUMBER)=  TRIM( LEADING '0' FROM COALESCE(NESR.SALES_REP_NUMBER,CAST('99998' AS VARCHAR(30))))/*trim function added as a part of RTEQ2FY15CR by sabanil */
   AND NESR.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV NSTT
   ON ELSC.SHR_NODE_ID=NSTT.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT AND NSTT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01' 
   LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCA_FOR_RTE_TRX_TV NRSCA 
   ON SRSCA.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY = NRSCA.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY
   AND NRSCA.END_TV_DT= CAST('3500-01-01' AS date)
   AND NRSCA.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD ='R'
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SUCLSCN.TRX_SC_ID, SUCLSCN.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME 
  ORDER BY SUCLSCN.REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1 
  WHERE  SUCLSCN.SOURCE_DML_TYPE<> 'DELETE'  
  )TMP
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TMP.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY ORDER BY TMP.START_TV_DTM DESC) = 1
